subcodes.first_line: O Abá-Turáb! Render thanks unto the All-Bountiful for having aided thee to recognize Him and for having caused thee to turn toward the City which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابا تراب ان اشکر الوهاب بما ایدک علی عرفانه و جعلک مقبلا الی المدینه التی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @spiritual transformation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
